title: GalLab
description: General resource pack for all my datapacks.
body:
**You don't need to install this resource pack without installing my datapacks.** 
**This resource pack does not change any vanilla elements of the game!**

This resourcepack is required for the correct work of some of my datapacks. You can still use datapacks without this resourcepack.

In addition to adding visual aspects, this resource pack also translates datapacks into these languages:
- English (Default)
- Spanish Espain
- Spanish Mexico
- Russian

You can help translate into other languages by contacting me on [Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/user/GalSergey).

In addition to datapack resources, this resource pack adds color filters with which you can change the color of the entire screen, creating a simulation of a color filter in front of your eyes.

Usage:

    title @a title {"text":"<opacity>","font":"filter:fill","color":"<color>"}
    # <opacity> - char from 1 to a (1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9,a) is the opacity from 10% (1) to 100% (a).
    # <color> - any color name or any HEX color code

Command result for example command: `title @a title {"text":"3","font":"filter:fill","color":"#00FF00"}`
![https://i.imgur.com/vu9XIyW.jpeg](https://i.imgur.com/vu9XIyW.jpeg)
